title: ipomoea ferruginea
intro: Ipomoea ferruginea, also known as the rusty morning glory, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to have medicinal benefits in treating various health conditions. The plant's leaves and roots can be used to prepare herbal remedies that aid in reducing fever, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Ipomoea ferruginea can be combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that promote overall well-being.
